ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Rate of urbanization */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "corruption_index" REAL /* Corruption perception index (scale 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "entrepreneurial_indicators" (
  "code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the indicator entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "financing" REAL /* Financing available for entrepreneurs */,
  "government_support" REAL /* Support and policies from the government */,
  "taxes_bureaucracy" REAL /* Taxation and bureaucracy indicators */,
  "government_programs" REAL /* Governmental programs supporting entrepreneurship */,
  "school_education" REAL /* School-level entrepreneurship education quality */,
  "post_school_education" REAL /* Post-school entrepreneurship education quality */,
  "rd_transfer" REAL /* Research and Development transfer capabilities */,
  "commercial_infra" REAL /* Commercial infrastructure quality */,
  "market_dynamics" REAL /* Dynamics of internal market */,
  "market_openness" REAL /* Openness of the internal market to competition */,
  "physical_services_infra" REAL /* Quality of physical and service infrastructure */,
  "cultural_norms" REAL /* Cultural and social norms affecting entrepreneurship */,
  "innovation_capacity" REAL /* Innovation capacity */,
  "global_competitiveness" REAL /* Global competitiveness index (scale 1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entrepreneurial_indicators_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the program */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the governmental program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the program */,
  "sector_focus" TEXT /* Sector(s) of focus for the program */,
  "target_beneficiaries" TEXT /* Target beneficiaries of the program (e.g., startups, SMEs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_programs_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the institution */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., school, university) */,
  "programs_offered" TEXT /* List of programs offered related to entrepreneurship */,
  "curriculum_quality" REAL /* Quality of entrepreneurship curriculum (scale 1-5) */,
  "faculty_expertise" REAL /* Expertise of faculty members in entrepreneurship (scale 1-5) */,
  "industry_links" REAL /* Extensiveness of industry links for entrepreneurship education (scale 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_institutions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxation" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxation entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "income_tax_rate" REAL /* Income tax rate (%) for individuals */,
  "corporate_tax_rate" REAL /* Corporate tax rate (%) for businesses */,
  "vat_rate" REAL /* Value-added tax (VAT) rate (%) */,
  "business_incentives" TEXT /* Description of any business incentives related to taxes */,
  "double_taxation_agreements" TEXT /* Details of double taxation agreements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxation_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, entrepreneur) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country of residence for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_dynamics" (
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market dynamics entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "competition_level" REAL /* Level of competition in the market (scale 1-5) */,
  "barriers_to_entry" REAL /* Barriers to entry for new businesses (scale 1-5) */,
  "consumer_behavior" TEXT /* Description of consumer behavior affecting entrepreneurship */,
  "domestic_market_size" REAL /* Estimated domestic market size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dynamic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_dynamics_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultural_norms" (
  "norm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cultural norms entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "risk_tolerance" REAL /* Level of risk tolerance in society (scale 1-5) */,
  "attitude_towards_failure" REAL /* Societal attitude towards failure (scale 1-5) */,
  "support_for_innovation" REAL /* Support for innovation and new ideas (scale 1-5) */,
  "social_network_density" REAL /* Density of social networks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("norm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultural_norms_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the infrastructure entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "physical_infra_quality" REAL /* Quality of physical infrastructure (scale 1-5) */,
  "service_infra_quality" REAL /* Quality of service infrastructure (scale 1-5) */,
  "access_to_technology" REAL /* Access level to technology and internet (scale 1-5) */,
  "internet_penetration" REAL /* Internet penetration rate (%) */,
  "logistics_performance" REAL /* Logistics performance index (scale 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "innovation_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the innovation indicator entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "research_expenditure" REAL /* Total research expenditure */,
  "patents_registered" INTEGER /* Number of patents registered */,
  "startups_funded" INTEGER /* Number of startups funded */,
  "business_r_d_intensity" REAL /* Business R&D intensity (% of GDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innovation_indicators_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "global_trade" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "total_exports" REAL /* Total exports value */,
  "total_imports" REAL /* Total imports value */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance */,
  "foreign_direct_investment" REAL /* Foreign direct investment inflows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_global_trade_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sustainability" (
  "sustainability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sustainability entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions per capita */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in energy mix (%) */,
  "green_gdp" REAL /* Green GDP */,
  "ecological_footprint" REAL /* Ecological footprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sustainability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sustainability_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)
